title: Optimined
body:
This Modpack optimizes the Game with Mods like Sodium, Chunky, Entinty Culling to get more performance out of your Game and much more. Also the Modpack adds the Mod "Do a Barrel Roll" which makes flying with an Elytra more fun and more like fly in a FPV drone and not so boring like before.

The Mod focuses on giving Users with slow PC's more FPS and performance.
